storyInfo: Ratatos's funeral is held as planned, and Sciurus takes up the leadership of the clan, leading to a thawing of the relationships between the three clans. The Duke of Caster puts pressure on Enciodes. Enya continues her Pilgrimage, searching for the truth behind Kjeragandr's disappearance.

attributes.content: A layer of snow has formed on the withered branch. The Rift Cloudbeast climbs to its tip, squinting in an impression of scouting.
The Saintess sighs, turning around to look behind her. The huntress following her pauses, her face slightly red from the wind.
Joanna... you don't need to follow me.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I'm very grateful for all that you've done.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: As I told you, though, the Pilgrimage must be completed alone. Strictly speaking, I shouldn't even be talking to you.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I know.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I'm not following you. I'm not your guard or your servant. I just happen to be traveling in the same direction.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Don't worry, I won't talk to you. If anyone sees us, I'll pretend I don't know you.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I won't let danger strike you again. I'll just follow behind.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Do you know where I'm going?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Wherever you're going, I'm going. That's all I need to know.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But... I'm looking for Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Looking for Her... did She disappear?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I don't know. But disaster will strike Kjerag again if She doesn't return.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: People will lose their lives, and even more will lose their faith...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I must return to the Vine-Bead Court and consult the tomes. The others must not know, for now.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Then I'll follow you. Don't worry, if anyone's on your tail, I'll chase them away for you—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Purr—
I think the Rift Cloudbeast just saw something.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: In the direction that the Rift Cloudbeast is looking, the trail to the Vine-Bead Court is filled with people dressed in solemn colors.
Looks like... someone very important just passed away.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Who could it be?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Enya shakes her head. She cannot help but feel a shiver down her spine, thick though her clothes are.
Are you alright, Enya?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: We'll go slowly, around the crowd.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Dark clouds hang low, almost touching the temple's eaves. It is a cold day even by Kjerag standards, and the north wind seems to penetrate the eyes and spines of the mourners.
Family members and clerics gather in the courtyard with heads bowed. The people of the Browntail domain have gathered outside, to honor and grieve their matriarch, who protected Kjerag with her life.
Snow falls upon the black umbrellas. One of the Browntail nobles gives the one in his hand a little shake, and sighs as the snow pours down.
So, the matriarch's body...
attributes.name: Male Browntail Noble

attributes.content: They never found it. The fire was too big. They turned over every inch of whatever was left, but found nothing.
attributes.name: Female Browntail Noble

attributes.content: I heard they had to put her usual attire in the coffin, along with some ashes gathered from the scene. Nothing more.
attributes.name: Female Browntail Noble

attributes.content: How sad... to think that one as bright as the matriarch would—
attributes.name: Male Browntail Noble

attributes.content: M-Madam Sciurus.
attributes.name: Male Browntail Noble

attributes.content: ...I apologize. I spoke out of turn.
attributes.name: Male Browntail Noble

attributes.content: Sciurus does not answer. She walks to the center of the courtyard, waiting for her sister, who had been by her side for long as she could remember.
Chimes tremble to the melody of the flutes. The clerics put their hands together and chant Kjeragandr's hymn, and the people place their hands upon their hearts in prayer to the song—
Kjeragandr have mercy, take her with you.
Six members of Clan Browntail's main branch carry a heavy nanmu wood coffin up the muddy road, Yucatan at the head of the procession.
They carefully lay the coffin down on a table, in front of the new Browntail matriarch.
Yucatan walks to his wife, the grief on his face contrasting with Sciurus's calm expression.
Yucatan...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Rus, I...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Thank you.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: The hymn draws to a close. All is quiet and all eyes fall on Sciurus.
For the first time, she understands the mask that Ratatos was forced to wear, the weight of responsibility, which crushes those unworthy of it.
Thank you for being here, to honor the memory of Ratatos Browntail.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: She was my sister, staunch guardian of Clan Browntail, and faithful child of Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Her wisdom gave her courage. She told me that she would protect me and everything here... and she always believed in a better tomorrow for Kjerag, even in the most troubling times.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: All her life, she carried out the task that our grandfather entrusted to her, giving everything to Clan Browntail, even in her final moments.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I have lost someone very dear to me. It is only today that I realize the weight of the burden that she carried, but I will never have the chance to tell her.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I know you will remember her face, her voice, her sacrifice, and her deep love... for Kjerag, for Clan Browntail, and for her family.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: And you will remember, as I do, who took her from us, leaving behind wounds that can never fully heal.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: 'A life so short and bright as dawn, shall walk with Her in eternity'...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: 'By Kjeragandr,' answer the crowd, following Sciurus' lead as they kneel and pay respect to the departed.
Even in times like these, when all is swept up in calamity, Kjeragandr will continue to bring peace and tranquility to the people of Kjerag...
Two figures emerge from the crowd as those in attendance stand back up. It is Arctosz and Matterhorn, approaching the coffin with white flowers in hand.
My condolences, Sciurus...
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Ratatos died because of me. I'll never forget it.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Thank you, Arctosz.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: This is a painful lesson to both our clans, to recognize who our true enemies are.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Matriarch Sciurus...
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Sir Enciodes expresses his regret for not being able to attend the funeral, and sends his apologies and condolences. He will pay a visit to Browntail Manor personally, when the time is right. Please take care, Matriarch Sciurus.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: He's so busy he can't even come to the funeral?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Thank you. I understand. Clan Browntail recognizes the work that Enciodes has done for Kjerag.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Let us continue the ceremony. I believe we have matters to discuss.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: The crowd departs. The empty coffin is buried on Browntail land, next to the grandfather who loved her so dearly.
With lips pressed together, Sciurus looks to the two men before her. Both look slightly angry.
I'm simply reiterating the decision of the last Tri-Clan Council, Sir Arctosz: All external affairs shall be handled by Sir Enciodes and Clan Silverash, including matters associated with Victoria.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Is this why you had the nerve to demand the Victorian spies?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The murder of the Browntail Matriarch is no small affair. I won't allow the Silverashes to interrogate them on your own.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Master Matterhorn, it was the Matriarch of Clan Browntail who was assassinated. I believe Clan Browntail should have full authority on this matter.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Is Enciodes not pleased with this arrangement?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Of course not. However, it is a matter of principle to defer to the tradition of the Tri-Clan Council. There is formal and rational justification for allowing Clan Silverash to handle the spies.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: We've deferred to Silverash enough already, Matterhorn.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: You people have given us nothing but excuses when it comes to negotiating with the Victorians, and now these people have conducted terror attacks in broad daylight.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: How about we invite Enciodes to explain his attitude towards the Victorians and what he's planning to Sciurus's face, and then we can talk about the spies.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Kindly refrain from baseless speculation, Sir Arctosz. I have already shown considerable restraint.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: You and Matriarch Ratatos were not the only ones to be attacked. Lady Ensia also narrowly escaped with her life. I would like nothing more than to get my hands on the assassins personally.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Well, if that's true, then this will be easy enough.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We'll put the Victorians on trial in front of all Kjerag, and then we let Clan Browntail have their way with them.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Let all Terra know that Kjerag shows no mercy to our enemies.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Too reckless!
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: We already interrogated them. They were awfully tight-lipped. I doubt a public trial would achieve anything.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Instead, I'm worried they may see that as an opportunity to get a rise out of the people. It's not a risk we can take, with all the unrest in Kjerag right now.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: If they have the guts to do so, just cut their tongues out.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We should have dragged them out and spilled their blood for Ratatos at the funeral!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Arctosz... no one wants vengeance for my sister more than I do. But we can't get carried away while there is still the hope of actually coaxing some information from them.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Matriarch Sciurus is right. This is a matter for—
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Please excuse the interruption. A cleric from the Vine-Bead Court has something to discuss.
attributes.name: Browntail Servant

attributes.content: The last envoy from Vine-Bead Court almost got Arctosz and Ensia killed.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: How do I know you are who you say you are?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: There is no need to be concerned. Sir Arctosz knows me.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: He's right, this is Father Frey from the Vine-Bead Court.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Alright then. What is it you want to say, Father?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I am here for the Victorian spies.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: The position of the Vine-Bead Court is that this is an extremely delicate issue. There will be considerable criticism and unrest, no matter which of the three clans takes charge.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Therefore, the spies should be placed in the custody of the Court. We shall arrange interrogations, of which you will be informed and in which you'll have the opportunity to participate.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: I object. Why delay things when we're going to kill them anyway?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The Vine-Bead Court can't do this. The Tri-Clan Council has already decided that Clan Silverash will handle Victorian affairs.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Need I remind you that the Tri-Clan Council also agreed to return temporal power to the Court?
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: The Saintess is on her Pilgrimage right now. The Vine-Bead Court cannot decide on her behalf!
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: It is interesting that you would mention the Saintess now, when Sir Enciodes has always been at odds with us.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: All Kjerag knows that the Saintess and the Vine-Bead Court have always been of one mind. The scriptures speak testament to this.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: The Vine-Bead Court has often acted on behalf of the Saintess in her absence.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Tell Sir Enciodes he should not presume to take all the power for himself.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Father—
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Calm down, Matterhorn.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Clan Browntail accedes to the request. You can send your people tomorrow, Father, and we will hand the spies over to the Vine-Bead Court.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Sciurus?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: I know your concerns, but it's more important than ever to put aside the conflicts between the three clans... it would be great to have the Vine-Bead Court mediate.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Thank you for your wisdom, Matriarch. The Vine-Bead Court prays for Clan Browntail.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Sciurus bows to the Vine-Bead Court envoy.
It is past noon, and the funeral procession begins to disperse.
A man sitting in a car parked a little bit away witnesses the scene, then draws the curtain over the window.
Looks like someone is getting impatient.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: There has been a lot of movement in the Vine-Bead Court ever since the Saintess's departure.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I was surprised that Ratatos was willing to go this far.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Using herself as bait to draw out the Victorian spies.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: An impressive performance that brought the actions of Victoria into the daylight.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: And if the Victorians are trying to instigate a war between her and the other clans, this is also the most effective way to cleanse any suspicion from Clan Browntail.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But it's not enough... we must make good use of the valuable time that Ratatos bought us.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Why didn't you show up at her funeral?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I wanted to avoid direct conflict with the other clan leaders, especially in public.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: And... How's Enya?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Her injuries were minor. All the Victorian assassins are dead.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Enya says she has a plan to carry out in secret. She told me to come back, once we cleaned up.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: All the people know is that the Saintess is currently on her Pilgrimage. All the Victorians know is that their assassination attempt failed. You've wiped out all the traces from the mountains.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: And it's certainly true that the presence of the legendary Black Knight would not be conducive to secrecy.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: That's what I thought as well.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Not a bad plan. I also need people I can trust by my side for what is to come.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Our real troubles have only just begun.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Enciodes takes out an envelope and hands it to Degenbrecher. Inside is a thick stack of agreements, and a letter written in Victorian.
Read it.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: A letter? From whom?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: You could call it a letter...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Or a declaration of war.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.text: To the Chairman of Karlan Trade, the son of my kinswoman Elizabeth—
\n\nI hope this letter finds you well. It has been more than a decade since we met at that banquet.

\nPerhaps you recalled our conversations, as I did, when you heard about recent events in Victoria. You foretold the conflicts that I was personally involved in, and you have earned the right to sit at the table with Victoria as equals.
\nBut do not forget that every step you have taken is on a path that Victoria wants to see taken, one which she has paved for you.

Victoria's position remains the same after the Catastrophe. We support Kjerag's development and respect Kjerag's faith. And I believe that Clan Silverash and Kjerag have never needed more help than now.

Based on the current partnership with Karlan Trade, I will accept the following proposal: A special office jointly created, funded and managed by both sides, establishing a foundation with its location in the city center.
\nVictoria will double down on existing investment in the form of equipment and interest-free loans, and share more industrial technology to support the future development of Kjerag.
All Kjerag needs to do is to open its doors to Victorian mining efforts, including but not limited to Originium, repaying the loans in kind.

\nKarlan Trade will not need to provide any cash. After all, there are many places where it can be put to good use, considering present circumstances in Kjerag. I believe this to be a fair sign of good faith.
The associated contracts have already been drafted and enclosed, ready for your review and signature.
\nI will be happy to meet with you, should you wish to discuss the details.
I look forward to the links that the Caster bloodline can build between us.
\nAnd I am curious as to whether Kjerag has become what you wanted it to be.
